title: Drip Campaign
shortDefinition: A series of automated emails sent to prospects over time based on their behavior or characteristics.

content.definition: A drip campaign is a sequence of pre-written emails automatically sent to prospects or customers based on triggers—like signing up for a webinar, downloading a resource, or being tagged with a specific profile. Each email drips out at a predetermined interval, keeping your message in front of prospects without manual effort.
content.whyItMatters: Most prospects aren't ready to buy on their first touch. Drip campaigns keep you top-of-mind while they evaluate, without burning out your sales team sending manual follow-ups. A good drip sequence can move an unqualified prospect toward readiness for sales engagement in weeks. For bootstrapped founders, drip campaigns are leverage—they scale your ability to nurture leads without linear time investment.
content.howToApply: Identify key prospect journeys: new signups, webinar attendees, demo requesters, free trial users. Build specific drip sequences for each. Start with 3-5 emails spaced over 1-2 weeks. Test different messaging approaches—educational vs promotional, problem-focused vs solution-focused. Measure open rate, click rate, and conversion to next stage (demo request, trial signup, demo attendance). Optimize based on data: if email 2 has low open rates, test new subject lines. Segment your list—buyers with different pain points need different messages. IdeaFuel's Business Plan Generator helps you map prospect journeys and design drip sequences that move prospects systematically toward sales engagement.
commonMistakes: Sending too many emails too fast—overwhelming prospects is counterproductive. 2-3 emails over 2 weeks usually outperforms daily bombardment.
Using generic sequences for everyone—drip campaigns only work when messaging is relevant. Segment by company profile, pain point, or source.
Never measuring performance—sending the same sequence for months without testing is wasted opportunity. Track what works and iterate relentlessly.
content.ideafuelConnection: IdeaFuel's Business Plan Generator helps you design drip campaign sequences that move prospects through your sales funnel systematically and measure what messaging resonates.

seoTitle: What is a Drip Campaign? Examples & Best Practices | IdeaFuel Glossary
seoDescription: Drip campaigns are automated email sequences that nurture leads. Learn how to create effective sequences that convert.
